categories.name: Street Food of Nepal - Veg Starters

items.name: Chana Chatpate
items.description: A medium spicy mixture of puffed rice, roasted soybeans, diced onions, tomatoes, crunchy Waiwai noodles, green onions, Nepalese pickles, crushed crunchy puffed balls along with chilli spices and lemon juice. Note: This dish is served cold.

items.name: Pani Puri (Spicy)
items.description: 10 pieces of puffed balls with the filling of boiled potato and onions served with spicy and tangy cold water. Note: This dish is served cold.

items.name: Samosa Fried (2 pieces in a serve)
items.description: A vegetarian samosa deep fried, cooked and served with tomato ketchup/or chilli/Momo sauce.

items.name: Samosa Chat
items.description: Samosa topped with chickpeas, chop onion, snacks, yoghurt and special sauce.

items.name: Bhatmas Sadheko
items.description: Roasted soybeans mixed up with the red onions, tomatoes, green onions, Nepalese pickles along with chilli spices and lemon juice. Note: This dish is served cold with lemon wedge.

items.name: Peanut Sadheko
items.description: Peanuts mixed up with the red onions, tomatoes, green onions, Nepalese pickles along with chilli spices and lemon juice. Note: This dish is served cold with lemon wedge.

items.name: Wai-Wai Sadheko
items.description: Wai-Wai crunchy noodles mixed up with the red onions, tomatoes, green onions, Nepalese pickles along with chilli spices and lemon juice. Note: This dish is served cold with lemon wedge.

items.name: Mix Salad
items.description: Cucumber, carrot and onion and on top chat masala.

items.name: Aalu Nimki
items.description: Nimki mixed up with aalu, red onion, tomatoes, green onion, peas, nepalese pickles alone with chilli spices and lemon juice.

items.name: Newari Khaja Set
items.description: Choila, bara, egg, aalu achar, aalu bodi tama, bhatmas, chiura and salad.

items.name: Choila
items.description: Spicy, marinated & roasted chicken/buffalo/lamb mixed with green onions, ginger, garlic, and chilli finished with Nepalese spices and mustard oil, fenugreek seeds. Note: This dish is served cold.

items.name: Chicken Deep Fried Sausage (3 pieces)
items.description: It is served with chilli and momo sauce and finished with chat masala.

items.name: Mutton Tass Set
items.description: Overnight marinated diced goat in garlic, ginger and homemade spice, roasted on thicken iron pan served with puffed rice, salad & chutney.

items.name: Buff Sukuti Set
items.description: A medium spicy, crisp dry buff meat sauteed with onions, tomatoes, ginger, garlic and seasoned with Nepalese spices and served with Flattened rice. Note: This dish contains buff meat and can be tough and chewy.

items.name: Buff Sadheko
items.description: Authentic Nepalese Spicy mixture of onion, Tomato, shallot, fresh ginger garlic, coriander, lemon juice and peanut.

items.name: Bhutan Set
items.description: Boiled Goat Intestines pan fried with onions and homemade spices & also goes with aalu achar, bhatmas, chiura and salad.

items.name: Nepali Rice Thali Set
items.description: Curry comes with bone. Basmati rice, daal, aalu achar, saag, pickle, papad, salad & dessert.

items.name: Dhindo ra Gundruk Thali
items.description: Curry comes with bone. Nepalese style buckwheat flour pudding on top ghee, aalu, achar, saag, pickle, papad, salad & sweet yoghurt.

items.name: Poleko Kukhura Hot Sizzling
items.description: Charcoal roasted whole chicken marinated overnight in tandoori spices served with mint sauce.

items.name: Chicken Tikka Sizzler
items.description: Clay ovened boneless chicken fillets marinated overnight in tandoori spices and served with mint sauce.

items.name: Rato Daal
items.description: Overnight-soaked lentils fried with onion, spices and cooked in slow heat with spices and ghee.

items.name: Paneer Curry
items.description: Fried cottage cheese, capsicum and onion cooked with spices and masala gravy.

items.name: Butter Paneer Masala
items.description: Fried cottage cheese cooked in herbs and spices with creamy tomato gravy.

items.name: Aalu Bodi Tama
items.description: Beautiful combination of potato, bamboo shoot, black eyed beans cooked with Nepalese spices and herbs.

items.name: Goat Curry
items.description: Dice bone meat cooked with combination of Nepalese homemade spices.

items.name: Chicken Curry
items.description: Dice bone meat cooked with combination of Nepalese homemade spices.

items.name: Butter Chicken
items.description: Delicious chicken tikka cooked in rich creamy red tomato gravy.

items.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
items.description: Tandoori grilled tikka chicken cooked with tomato, onion and capsicum in a masala sauce.

items.name: Mutton Soup
items.description: Soup of slow cooked mutton bone spiced with Nepalese herbs.

items.name: Thukpa
items.description: A medium sized soupy noodle cooked with vegetables/egg/chicken/buffalo seasoned with Nepalese herbs, spices, and sour lemon juice.

items.name: Hot & Sour Soup
items.description: Soup made with carrot, cabbage, beans, papper, ginger, garlic, shallots, & light Nepalese spices, served with lemon wedge.

items.name: Jumbo Wings
items.description: 6 pieces serve of medium sized jumbo wings seasoned with Nepalese spices and flavors served with homemade chilli sauce and mild sauce. Note: 6 pieces of jumbo wings in a serve.

items.name: Bowl of Chips
items.description: A medium serves of crispy potato chips with regular salt sprinkled along with tomato ketchup on the side.

items.name: Buff Chilli
items.description: Tossed with capsicum, onion in chef's special chilli sauce.

items.name: Sizzling Chilli Paneer
items.description: Tossed with capsicum, onion in chef's special chilli sauce.

items.name: Wings Chilli
items.description: Deep fried wings sauteed with peppers, onions and green onions, soy sauce, sweet and medium hot spicy sauce along with nepalese herbs and flavoring spices.

items.name: Chilli Masala (Chicken)
items.description: Boneless chicken meat sauteed with onions, capsicum, green onions, soy sauce, sweet and medium hot spicy sauce along with Nepalese herbs & flavoring spices. Add on: Plain rice for $4.80. Note: This dish can be medium spicy or hot & dry.

items.name: Chilli Paneer
items.description: Deep fried chilli marinated Indian cottage cheese (paneer) sauteed with onions, capsicum, green onions, soy sauce, sweet & medium hot spicy sauce with Nepalese herbs & falvoring spices. Add on: Plain rice for $4.80. Note: This dish can be medium spicy or hot & dry.

items.name: Veggie Pasta
items.description: Mushroom and mix vegetables. Choice of sauce, pesto sauce, tomato sauce, white sauce.

items.name: Nepalese Chicken & Mushroom Pasta
items.description: White sauce and mushroom garlic & ginger along with mixture of Nepalese herbs and spices, cheese and Italian mix herbs.

items.name: Nepalese Pesto Chicken Pasta
items.description: Pesto sauce contains basil, spinach, cashew, along with garlic & ginger along with mixture of Nepalese herbs and spices, cheese and Italian mix herbs.

items.name: Garlic Prawn Pasta (6pcs prawn)
items.description: Tomato sauce, Vienna prawns, garlic, ginger, Napoli sauce, shallots along with mixture of Nepalese herbs and spice, cheese and Italian mix herbs.

items.name: Chowmein
items.description: Nepalese style stirred fried noodles sauteed with veggies, garlic, ginger, soy sauce and flavoring of Nepalese herbs and spices. Meats are added as per the options chosen. Add Extra Chicken $5 / Egg $4 / Schezwan $4 / Prawn $9 / Buff $6.

items.name: Steamed Momo
items.description: Nepalese style steamed dumplings with fillings of vegetables/chicken/buffalo with ginger, garlic, coriander, onion, and Nepalese spices served with homemade spices and tomato based mild sauce.

items.name: Sizzling Momo
items.description: Served with Nepalese dry herbs and spices sizzled salad.

items.name: Momo Platter
items.description: Momo steam, kothey, c-momo, fried.

items.name: Mutton Soup Momo (Hot)
items.description: Momo of your choice dipped in soup of slow cooked mutton bone spiced with Nepalese herbs.

items.name: House Special Fried Rice
items.description: Steamed rice fried with the mixed vegetables and green onions along with ginger, garlic and soy sauce and finished with Nepalese herbs and spices. Meats are added as per the options chosen. Add Extra Chicken $5 / Egg $4 / Extra Prawn $9 / Buff $6.

items.name: Biryani
items.description: Saffron rice flavoured with aromatic spices medium hot served with raita condiment of spices, yoghurt, cucumber, carrot & roasted cumin seed.

items.name: Chicken Nuggets & Chips
items.description: 5 pcs of nuggets & small chips.

items.name: Virgin Mojito
items.description: With fresh mint leaves, lemon juice, sugar syrup and lemonade.

items.name: Passion Fruit Virgin Mojito
items.description: Passion fruit, fresh mint, lemon juice and lemonade.

items.name: Cucumber Cooler
items.description: Goes with cucumber syrup, fresh lemon juice and simple syrup.

items.name: Sunrise Mocktail
items.description: Goes with pineapple juice, orange juice, lemon juice, simple syrup and grenadine.

items.name: Cranberry Raspberry Lemonade
items.description: Cranberry juice, raspberry juice and lemonade.

items.name: Sauvignon Blanc (White)
items.description: Whole bottle $40.

items.name: Pinot Grigio (White)
items.description: Whole bottle $40.

items.name: Moscato (White)
items.description: Whole bottle $40.

items.name: Rose (White)
items.description: Whole bottle $40.

items.name: Chardonnay (White)
items.description: Whole bottle $40.

items.name: Mojito
items.description: Goes with white rum, fresh mint leaves, lime juice and simple syrup.

items.name: Passion Fruit Mojito
items.description: Goes with white rum, fresh mint leaves, lime juice and simple syrup.

items.name: Midori Splice
items.description: Melon liquor, coconut rum and pineapple juice.

items.name: Long Island Ice Tea
items.description: Vodka, rum, gin, tequila and triple sec.

items.name: Margarita
items.description: Goes with tequila, triple sec and fresh lime juice.

items.name: Chilli Margarita
items.description: Goes with tequila, triple sec and fresh lime juice.

items.name: Coconut Chilli Margarita
items.description: Goes with tequila, triple sec, lime juice, sugar syrup, coconut syrup and tabasco sauce.

items.name: Cosmopolitan
items.description: Goes with vodka, Cointreau, lime juice and cranberry juice.

items.name: Pina Colada
items.description: Goes with light rum, coconut cream, pineapple juice and lime juice.

items.name: Pornstar Martini
items.description: Goes with vanilla vodka, passoa, passion fruit puree and vanilla sugar.

items.name: Sex on the Beach
items.description: Goes with vodka, peach schnapps, orange juice and cranberry juice.

items.name: Lychee Martini
items.description: Vodka, lychee liquor, sweet and sour, lychee syrup.

items.name: Kathmandu Sling
items.description: Khukuri rum, gin, grenadine, triple sec, lime juice and pineapple juice.

items.name: Last Kiss
items.description: Dry gin, lime juice, honey syrup, purple gel liquor.

items.name: Rainbow Paradise
items.description: White rum, grenadine, pineapple juice and blue curacao.

items.name: Tequila Sunrise
items.description: Tequila, triple sec, orange juice and grenadine.

items.name: Last Word
items.description: Dry gin, green chartreuse, maraschino liquor and lime juice.

items.name: Pink Lady
items.description: Gin, triple sec, grenadine and lime juice.

items.name: Kentucky Maid
items.description: Bourbon, simple syrup, lime juice, mint leaves, & cucumber slices.

items.name: Moscow Mule
items.description: Vodka, fresh lime and ginger beer.

items.name: Whisky Sour
items.description: Bourbon whisky, lemon juice, sugar syrup and egg white.

items.name: Jade the Dragon
items.description: Midori, apple juice, gin, pineapple juice and sugar syrup.

items.name: Blue Hawaiian
items.description: White rum, blue curacao, pineapple juice, coconut cream.

items.name: Blue Lagoon
items.description: Vodka, triple sec and blue curacao.

items.name: X.Y.Z.
items.description: White rum, cointreau/triple sec, lemon juice & lemon twist (garnish).

items.name: Old Fashioned
items.description: Bourbon whisky, angostura bitters and simple syrup.

items.name: Divorce Papers
items.description: Dry gin, aperol, passion fruit puree, honey syrup, lemon juice.

items.name: Jungle Bird
items.description: Dark rum, pineapple juice, campari, lime juice, simple syrup, & pineapple wedge.

items.name: Negroni

items.name: Strawberry Lychee Caprioska
items.description: Vodka, strawberry liquor, lychee liquor, lychee syrup, lime juice.
